name: Test.Extra
comment:
Extends `Test` with specialized test and describe function.

## Describing JSON Decoders

Write concise test for JSON decoders

@docs DecoderExpectation, describeDecoder, testDecoder

unions.name: DecoderExpectation
unions.comment:
Expectation for a decoder result.

* `FailsToDecode` - expect the decoder to fail, the failure message can be anything
* `FailsToDecodeWith String` - expect the decoder to fail with a specific message
* `DecodesTo a` - expect the decoder to succeed, decoding to the provided value

values.name: describeDecoder
values.comment:
Exercise a decoder over a list of input/expectation pairs.

For example

```elm
describeDecoder "int"
  Json.Decode.int
  [ ( "", FailsToDecode )
  , ( "foo", FailsToDecode )
  , ( "1", DecodesTo 1 )
  , ( "1.5", FailsToDecode )
  ]
```
values.type: String -> Decoder a -> List ( String, DecoderExpectation a ) -> Test

values.name: testDecoder
values.comment:
Exercise a decoder with a JSON encoded string.

For example

```elm
testDecoder Json.Decode.string
  "\"foo\""
  (DecodesTo "foo")
```
values.type: Decoder a -> ( String, DecoderExpectation a ) -> Test

values.name: contain
values.comment:
Alias of `member`.

Reads better with bdd style tests.

    expect [0, 1, 2] to contain 1

    -- Passes because [0, 1, 2] contains 1

values.name: member
values.comment:
Passes if value is a member of list.

    member 1 [0, 1, 2]

    -- Passes because 1 is a member of [0, 1, 2]

name: Fuzz.Extra

values.name: eitherOr
values.comment:
Combine two fuzzers.

    fuzzMaybeInt : Fuzzer (Maybe Int)
    fuzzMaybeInt =
        Fuzz.Extra.eitherOr
            (Fuzz.constant Nothing)
            (Fuzz.int |> Fuzz.map Just)
values.type: Fuzzer a -> Fuzzer a -> Fuzzer a

values.name: sequence
values.comment: Sequence a list of fuzzers into a fuzzer of a list.

values.name: stringMaxLength
values.comment: Generates random printable ASCII with a maximum length.

values.name: uniformOrCrash
values.comment:
Generates among the provided values with uniform distribution

Like `Fuzz.frequencyOrCrash` but with uniform distribution.

    httpMethod : Fuzzer Method
    httpMethod =
        [ GET, POST, PUT, DELETE, OPTIONS ]
            |> List.map Fuzz.constant
            |> uniformOrCrash

Same as for `frequencyOrCrash`: "This is useful in tests, where a crash will
simply cause the test run to fail. There is no danger to a production system
there."

values.name: union
values.comment:
Create a fuzzer for a union type.

__Deprecated__: use `uniformOrCrash`
values.type: List a -> a -> Shrinker a -> Fuzzer a
